headline: Gasoline Prices Are Still High, but This Inflation Reading Could Be Even More Worrisome for Nike Stock.
summary: Nike stock is confounded by multiple forms of inflation, including high producer prices.

headline: NIKE (NKE) Downgraded at RBC Capial Amid Slow and Narrow Progress
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.57%, NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) is included among the 12 High Yield Fortune 500 Stocks to Buy Now. NIKE, Inc. (NYSE:NKE) is engaged in the designing, marketing, and distribution of athletic footwear, apparel, equipment, and accessories and services for sports and fitness activities.
